Who We Are

We don't just install lights —
we transform your evenings.

Landscape Illuminations is a locally owned business serving homeowners across Birmingham, the surrounding communities, and the Lake Martin area. Every project starts with a free in-person consultation, and we don't call it done until you're completely satisfied.

When you work with us, you're talking to the same people from first call to final walkthrough. No franchise. No call center. Just neighbors who take pride in their work.

Free

Design Consult

6

Days a Week

100%

Satisfaction

Learn More About Us

What We Do

What we can do
for your property.

All Services
01

Landscape Up-Lighting

Highlight your trees, columns, and architectural details with carefully aimed fixtures that bring out the best of your home at night.

02

Security Lighting

Light up the dark corners of your yard and keep your family safe — without making your home look like a parking lot.

03

Patio & Deck Lighting

Turn your outdoor space into somewhere you actually want to spend the evening. Great lighting makes all the difference.

04

Walkway Lighting

Guide guests to your front door safely and in style. Low-profile fixtures that look great day or night.

05

Driveway Lighting

Make a great first impression from the street and improve visibility when pulling in after dark.

06

Custom Design

Not sure what you need? We'll walk your property with you and put together a plan that fits your home and your budget.

Why Us

We treat your home
like it's our own.

Locally Owned

We're your neighbors — not a franchise. We care about the communities we serve and take pride in every install.

100% Satisfaction

We stay in constant communication and don't leave until you're completely happy with the results.

Free Design Consult

Every project starts with a free in-person visit. We design a custom plan for your home — no charge, no pressure.

LED Efficient

All of our installs use energy-efficient LED fixtures that look great, last for years, and keep energy bills low.

How It Works

Simple from start
to switch-on.

01

You Reach Out

Call, text, or fill out the form. We'll get back to you quickly to set up a free consultation.

02

Free Site Visit

We come to your property, walk the yard with you, and put together a custom lighting design at no cost.

03

We Install It

Our team handles everything — clean installation with hidden wiring and perfectly placed fixtures.

04

You Love It

We don't wrap up until you're 100% satisfied. Then sit back and enjoy your home every night.
